instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability exists in the VZT LZMA_Read dmem extraction functionality of GTKWave 3.3.115. A specially crafted .vzt file can lead to arbitrary code execution. A victim would need to open a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.
output: GTKWave version 3.3.115 contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability within the VZT LZMA_Read memory extraction function. This flaw can be exploited by opening a maliciously crafted .vzt file, potentially allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
